item.title: Ironically this is exactly how the French voted too.
item.description: My French-speaking Imgurians can confirm, that "Can it" is a direct translation but it is more rude than that in the language, it's akin to stfu.

item.title: A Ferocious Dog
item.description: Gary Paulsen photo By Wyoming Department of Education, CC BY-SA 3.0, https://commons.wikimedia.org/w/index.php?curid=111023264 https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by-sa/3.0/ Sauce: Edith Hope Fine, Gary Paulsen: Author and Wilderness Adventurer (Berkeley Heights, NJ: Enslow Publications, Inc., 2000), pp. 38-39. “Gary James Paulsen (May 17, 1939 – October 13, 2021) was an American writer of children's and young adult fiction, best known for coming-of-age stories about the wilderness. He was the author of more than 200 books and wrote more than 200 magazine articles and short stories, and several plays, all primarily for teenagers. He won the Margaret Edwards Award from the American Library Association in 1997 for his lifetime contribution in writing for teens. […] “Bits and pieces of Gary's adolescence can be cobbled together in Guts: The True Stories Behind Hatchet and the Brian Books. In that book, Paulsen discusses how he survived between the ages of twelve and fourteen back in Minnesota. He barely mentions his parents except to say that they were too busy being drunk to stock the refrigerator. He worked several jobs during this time, including setting pins at a bowling alley, delivering newspapers, and working as a farmhand. He bought his own school supplies and a .22 single-shot rifle, which he used to hunt for sustenance. Eventually, he gave up the rifle and manufactured his own bow and arrows, which he used to hunt deer.” https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Gary_Paulsen  “Reading for me, is spending time with a friend. A book is a friend. You can never have too many.” — Gary Paulsen “Books make me feel safe. Books make me feel normal.” — Gary Paulsen
item.dc:creator: oukid

item.title: Guinea pig bridge in Nagasaki bio park
item.description: Very powerful and very beautiful

item.title: Wake Me Up Before You Go-Go - 100 Photos of Vintage 1980s Fashion!
item.description:
Yugoslavian kids, they both look spectacular! 1985
Girlfriends, 1986
Lisa Velez from Lisa Lisa and Cult Jam, 1986
1985
Dissident Aggression, indeed! 1984
Love this sweet Panda sweater dress, 1984
Steve Perry and his girlfriend Sherrie Swafford, 1983 - Perry wrote "Oh Sherrie" for her.
Cool boys, 1984
1987 - love the earrings!
Rabbit fur jacket, big glasses, cylinder bag, she may be a thief, 1980
The sunglasses game here is perfect and love the matching collar and bag, Venice Beach, CA, 1982 (photo by Garry Winogrand)
Janet Jackson in a sweater with colorful Spaghetti-Os on it
Friends at the winter dance, Cosby sweaters, middle finger, 1984
Two stylish friends, 1987
Porn Still #1 - Including a few porn stills because they are fantastic. She is a dream in white dress, frill socks and pink pumps. He has the mixed prints down pat.
Tight jeans and Motley Crue t-shirt, what else do you need? 1988
They spelled homecoming wrong, 1988
Spandau Ballet dressed as the Lost Boys, 1981 (photo by Lynn Goldsmith)
Three 80s beauties
Tri-Delts in Missouri, impressive backbends! 1983
I had added a couple pics of Shelley in this dump, then she passed yesterday. She was truly a fashion icon! RIP, Shelley - 1989
DeBarge with Mountain Dew! 1982
Tanned and wearing teal, 1984
Find the hickey! 1983
Fitness girl
Rocking the acid wash, spiky hair and sunglasses, 1984
1980s skater, love her ruffles
Z. Cavaricci, 1989
Rainbow sisters, 1982
Actress Joan Collins looking fly at the burger joint, 1982
Hookers at West 30th Street, NYC, 1985
Elizabeth Hurley at the Batcave in London, 1984.
Blue drink, big belt, hair hat, 1984
Skating at Empire Roller Disco, Brooklyn, NYC, 1980 (photo by Patrick Pagnano)
Garish glamour shot, 1983
Benetton - the clothes I couldn't afford, 1984
New Orleans, 1984
Here's another fantastic Shelley Duvall look, she's with her partner Dan Gilroy here, 1988
Ladies out in their office outfits at Happy Hour, 1988
Why so scared, girl? 1986
Dudes at the arcade, Times Square, NYC, 1980
The couple, NYC, 1981 (photo by Amy Arbus)
Ok, Jungle Love is the best prom theme song ever! Great typeface here, too! 1985
Band called the Dolly Dots!
Boys in the subway (photo by Jamel Shabazz)
Porn Still # 2 - dorky scarf, animal prints, headband and safari clothes (Out of Africa/Banana Republic aesthetic) on girl on right.
Fluorescent Shimmer, UK
NYC boys, 1984 (photo by Bill Cunningham)
Bootleg Duckie Dale, 1986
Four makeup looks from Merle Norman - sporty, romantic, corporate and Victorian widow, 1981
Fashionista Sarah Jessica Parker, California, 1987
Mishay Santos wants you to sweat, 1985
Paint-splattered style, 1987
Drew Barrymore and Corey Feldman, 1989 - also that gold butterfly dress in the background, wow!
Suburban girls trying to be punk, 1984
Spectacular outfit, he's an urban warrior, 1985, NYC (photo by Bill Cunningham)
Cyndi Lauper, sublime 80s makeup, jewelry and clothes, 1986
Jesus girl, 1980
Kids from London looking great, 1985
There is such a thing as too much lace, 1987
It's 1981! You can absolutely use garbage bags as clothing!
1985 haircut
Jordache ad, acid wash style, 1987
Brushing the hair with long nails and Sergio Valente jeans, 1982
Love the outfit, the attitude and the scrunchie, 1983
Philly girls, 1986
Prom, 1984
London teens, 1980s (photo by Shirley Baker)
Girl band called Fuzzbox, 1987
I kinda like these candy-striped leggings with the fuzzy coat, 1984
British adults with sweaters that have choo-choo trains on them
It's as if there are two entirely separate hair styles on one head
Phillip in London, 1982 (photo by Derek Ridgers)
Taking the phone message, 1987
These poor misled children - but the little girl on top has great hair!
Love this turtleneck top dress, and she's sweet to bring the one-eyed boy to the prom, 1987
Porn Still # 3 - her white dress and patterned stockings are nice, but get a load of the tube socks on the guy on right, classy!
I loved Altered Images! Clare Grogan's sweet little voice was enchanting.
Model Yasmin LeBon in blue, 1988
Stock photo of 80s teens
Sorority girls. She's got legs! The one without sunglasses ruined it.
House party, 1987
Nu Romantic fashion in London, 1982
Christmas in 1982, love the accessories here!
The red stockings with black pumps is so jarring. What's he going to do with the whip? 61st Street and Hudson River, NYC, 1985
Louise and Terry, NYC, 1983 (photo by Bill Cunningham)
The nerds love her. She loves Bryan Adams. What's a girl gonna do? 1985
Yes, we had a lot of neon, but a lot of candy pastels as well!
A Butterick pattern in case you want to dress like a giant toddler, 1989
Very 80s dress here, big shoulders, 1986
Reading newspapers and listening to the radio, Hollywood Beach, FL, 1985
Opening of the Palladium nightclub, NYC, 1985
Waiting for subway, NYC, 1980 (photo by Bruce Davidson)
More clothes I couldn't afford, Esprit, 1988
What are you lookin' at?
Bikini girls and rocker boys, California, 1986 (photo by Paul McDonough)
I had a pair of fold down jeans like these, 1986
Gorgeous look, casual sweater tossed over shoulders, fabulous shoes, 1984
British girls, 1987 (photo by Rob Bremner)
Mom and daughter before the dance, 1987

item.title: Sometimes the people you'll never forget, will never forget you either! Love this!
item.dc:creator: DumpingSh1tandBeingKind2

item.title: Never hesitate to reach out to someone...
item.description: I hadn't heard from or seen a coworker in a hot minute. Earlier this week I had the thought I should reach out and see how they're doing. Got a team wide email from leadership stating that said coworker passed away yesterday. They were fairly young in their early 30's. No details as to what happened, no news articles about fatal accidents, which makes me wonder whether or not it was suicide.... Fellow Imgurians....seriously, check in on people you care about. Never give yourself a reason to stay up late at night wondering "could I have done something to prevent this?". I'm still in shock that they're gone...
item.dc:creator: vader300

yeah
every right wing meme
This is your daily reminder that "Lone Wolf" was a strategy invented by far right groups to distance themselves from their terrorist attacks.
The power of this gun I found
We know what happens
http://discord.abbii.gay: For Chats http://twitch.abbii.gay: For Stream (m/w/f around 1830 UK time) http://tumblr.abbii.gay: For shitposts http://mastodon.abbii.gay: For microblogging

item.title: Baldwin case dismissed.
item.description: https://apnews.com/article/alec-baldwin-rust-shooting-hutchins-eb3059c696a9aee5cb86967e27d8f3bb Case dismissed with prejudice based on prosecution withholding evidence from the defense. Case cannot be refiled. The entire situation was very sad, but in my heart of hearts, having come from a family of actors, I feel like this was the right decision. Most viral edit: Make sure you are registered to vote. Let no one tell you that you cannot. Check out ballotpedia.org for valuable information on the upcoming election including what your ballot will look like. Vote blue at every possible level, up and down the ballot, even if you don't agree with some of the positions of your democratic candidates. We must absolutely make sure that the orange Pig anus is not once again in the White House, and that project 2025 is never implemented.
item.dc:creator: AyatollahBahloni

item.title: European Life … Maybe Someday
item.description: My wife and I got married last year, and she’s an Italian citizen. Turns out, we may move across the ocean to live there since America is such a great place to be right now. I’ll need to be able to achieve a skill level of B1 in Italian to be allowed citizenship due to marrying an Italian woman. I’ve been learning Spanish since my wife is fluent in Spanish (and most of her family is too), and I’ve gotten pretty good at that. So, off to the next language: Italian. I think I can do it in 3 years, but boy will it take some time. Wish me luck!

item.title: It was the style at the time
item.description: Embracing my inner Abe Simpson, pardon me while I go yell at some clouds Most Viral Edit: WOO!!! Thanks you awesome simpsons loving nerds! Some shameless self promotion, if you’re into handmade jewelry I do silver & gold smithing (also custom orders) @ monpetitvidecreations on IG or www.monpetitvidecreations.com/ (in the process of updating the website listings this weekend) https://imgur.com/a/mon-petit-vide-creations-limited-portfolio-E1nT5uX
